name: Q1683946
abstract: Jason Ignatius Marsalis (born March 4, 1977) is an American jazz drummer, vibraphone player, composer, producer, band leader, and member of the Marsalis family of musicians. He is the youngest son of Dolores Ferdinand Marsalis and the late Ellis Marsalis, Jr.

interviews.title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
